text.title: Nginx Production LB Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (workload, TLS, rate-limit, static content) to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: add zone <name> 64k; to every upstream block

branch.when: workers == auto AND zone_missing == false AND keepalive_missing == true
workers == auto AND zone_missing == false AND keepalive_missing == false AND tls_low == true
workers == auto AND zone_missing == false AND keepalive_missing == false AND tls_low == false AND rate_limit_missing == true

conclusion.verdict: declare limit_req_zone + apply limit_req on public routes

branch.when: workers == auto AND zone_missing == false AND keepalive_missing == false AND tls_low == false AND rate_limit_missing == false

conclusion.verdict: add 5 security headers (HSTS, XFO, XCTO, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: workers=auto → zone present → keepalive 32 present → TLS 1.2+ + stapling → limit_req_zone declared → 5 headers added → satisfies all 6 rules.
